chunks.text: Sumit Gulwani finds solutions to bridge the Digital Divide - EECS at Berkeley Alumni Sumit Gulwani (CS Ph.D. 2005) is at the centre of an effort to bring the power of computer code to those who are unable to write it themselves. Sumit’s research is featured in a Financial Times article which describes how his team at Microsoft developed Flash Fill for Excel which uses “programming by example” to automatically fill in outputs without entering a formula. Categories Alumni Entrepreneurship Industry View Open Faculty Positions
